_about: Optional add-ons for the reflect plugin's auto-wired hooks. Plugin 3.2.0+ already wires (via plugin.json): SessionStart -> recall + reflect-drain-bg.sh; PreCompact -> precompact_reflect.py --auto --verbose. Each named variant below is an OPT-IN extension or replacement. To use, copy the inner `hooks` object into ~/.claude/settings.json (or your tool's equivalent).
_for_non_claude_tools: Codex / Copilot adapter consumers don't run the Claude plugin runtime, so they need to copy the `non-claude-tools` variant verbatim — that's the manual fallback for the plugin's auto-wired defaults.

with-handover-and-backup._purpose: Adds /handover trigger + transcript backup to PreCompact, RUNNING ALONGSIDE the auto-wired --auto reflection (both fire). Useful if you want a recoverable pre-compaction snapshot and a structured handover doc.
with-handover-and-backup._requires: {{HOME_TOOL_DIR}}/hooks/pre_compact.py — ships with the agents-in-a-box toolkit (not the reflect plugin alone). Verify it exists before enabling.
with-handover-and-backup._merge_target: Append this PreCompact block to settings.json `hooks.PreCompact` (does NOT replace the auto-wired one).

remind-only._purpose: REPLACE the auto-wired --auto reflection with a non-blocking --remind. Use this if you'd rather invoke /reflect manually instead of having the bg drainer process queued transcripts.
remind-only._merge_target: Disable the plugin's PreCompact (remove from settings.json or fork the plugin) and copy this in.

non-claude-tools._purpose: Manual fallback for tools that don't run the Claude plugin runtime (Codex, Copilot, custom harnesses). Reproduces what plugin.json auto-wires for Claude Code.
non-claude-tools._merge_target: Replace your tool's settings hooks block entirely with this.
